data.title: CFTC Commissioner Caroline Pham Calls On CEO Nominations For New Prediction Markets Initiative
data.description:
CFTC Commissioner Caroline Pham has requested nominations to a new CEO Innovation Council and topics on prediction markets and crypto oversight, as the agency prepares for expanded markets and Mike Selig’s chair nomination has advanced ahead of her planned departure.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/cftc-commissioner-caroline-pham-calls-on-ceos-for-new-prediction-markets-initiative/

data.title: Solana developers propose major inflation cut that could reduce SOL issuance by up to 30%
data.description:
A new Solana proposal aims to accelerate inflation cuts and reduce SOL issuance, sparking debate over scarcity versus validator economics.
source: https://ambcrypto.com/solana-developers-propose-major-inflation-cut-that-could-reduce-sol-issuance-by-up-to-30/

data.title: Alien BTC findings: If humans vanished, Bitcoin’s block time and difficulty would preserve our collapse
data.description:
This is a speculative report translated for non-specialists. The narrator is an investigator who arrived long after humans were gone. Everything described as measured relies on real Bitcoin mechanics: block intervals, difficulty/target, timestamp rules, and data available from block headers and the coinbase transaction. We arrived on a silent planet
source: https://cryptoslate.com/alien-btc-findings-if-humans-vanished-bitcoins-block-time-and-difficulty-would-preserve-our-collapse/

data.title: UAE Brings DeFi, Web3, Stablecoins, and DEXs Under Central Bank Oversight
data.description:
The United Arab Emirates has taken one of its most sweeping regulatory steps to date with the enactment of Federal Decree No. 6 of 2025, a banking law that places DeFi, Web3 platforms, stablecoin protocols, decentralized exchanges, and cross-chain bridges directly under the supervision of the Central Bank of the UAE (CBUAE).
source: https://www.ethnews.com/uae-brings-defi-web3-stablecoins-and-dexs-under-central-bank-oversight/

data.description:

data.title: World Liberty Financial Pulled Into Crisis as ALT5 Sigma’s Hidden Conviction Surfaces
data.description:
ALT5 Sigma, the Canadian fintech firm that merged with World Liberty Financial in August 2025, is now engulfed in a widening web of investigations, undisclosed legal troubles, leadership upheaval, and regulatory pressure on both sides of the deal.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/world-liberty-financial-pulled-into-crisis-as-alt5-sigmas-hidden-conviction-surfaces/

data.title: Japan Emerges as Potential Bitcoin Demand Giant After Rule Changes
data.description:

source: https://cryptopotato.com/japan-emerges-as-potential-bitcoin-demand-giant-after-rule-changes/

data.title: Why Is Bitcoin Down? Blame Trump, Says Economist Paul Krugman

source: https://decrypt.co/350175/why-bitcoin-down-blame-trump-says-economist-paul-krugman

data.title: BlackRock quietly boosts its Bitcoin bet by 14%
data.description:
BlackRock is quietly deepening its Bitcoin bet while other investors await stable market conditions. A new quarterly filing reveals that the firm’s Strategic Income Opportunities Portfolio pushed its holdings of the iShares Bitcoin Trust (IBIT) by 14%. It now holds 2. 39 million shares worth roughly $156 million. This surge came in between June and September. […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/blackrock-quietly-boosts-its-bitcoin-bet-by-14/

data.title: JPMorgan Revises Forecast: Fed Expected to Cut Rates in December
data.description: According to ChainCatcher, JPMorgan economists have revised their forecast, now predicting that the Federal Reserve will initiate interest rate cuts in December. This marks a reversal from the bank's previous assessment a week ago, which anticipated that policymakers would delay rate cuts until January of next year. The research team noted that statements from several influential Federal Reserve officials supporting a near-term rate cut prompted them to reassess the situation. Currently, JPMorgan expects the Federal Reserve to implement two 25 basis point rate cuts in December and January.

data.title: Coinbase Targets RWA, DeFi & AI As Key Investment Areas For 2026
data.description:
Crypto exchange Coinbase highlighted prominent sectors it plans to invest in next year. This follows a surge in retail adoption and institutional capital into stablecoins, infrastructure, and Artificial Intelligence (AI). Coinbase Backs Nine Market Sectors The venture capitalists’ arm of Coinbase is targeting nine areas for fresh investment throughout 2026. In a recent blog post, […]
source: https://zycrypto.com/coinbase-targets-rwa-defi-ai-as-key-investment-areas-for-2026/

data.title: Xapo Bank Expands BTC Credit Fund to All Eligible Members After $100M Pilot
data.description:
Xapo Bank is widening access to its Xapo BTC Credit Fund, opening the product to all eligible members after a successful early-access phase that attracted $100 million in member allocations. The expansion marks a major step in the bank’s push to build a full suite of regulated wealth-management tools designed specifically for long-term Bitcoin holders.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/xapo-bank-expands-btc-credit-fund-to-all-eligible-members-after-100m-pilot/

data.title: Apple stares down $38B penalty in landmark India antitrust case
data.description:
Apple has challenged India’s amended penalty laws, arguing that the country’s regulators have no jurisdiction over global revenues. India has amended its penalty laws and now allows fines of up to 10% of a company’s global turnover, as against the standard penalty levied against domestic or product-specific revenue. Court challenges India’s global turnover penalty law […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/apple-38b-penalty-india-antitrust-case/

Grayscale filed with the SEC to register a U. S. spot Zcash ETF (ZCSH), aiming to give investors regulated exposure to ZEC without direct custody of coins. The post Grayscale Files for First U. S.
